name: geo-mining-research
description: Academic geoscience and mining research-router plugin with MCP data tools, evidence lanes, entity normalization, and Canadian mining disclosure boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: GIS + geochemistry + mineral exploration research with MCP data tools.
interface.longDescription: Routes open-ended geoscience and mining questions to specialized evidence lanes, normalizes AOIs, commodities, deposit models, jurisdictions, datasets, companies, claims, and technical-disclosure entities, and produces structured research briefs, evidence matrices, data gaps, and machine-readable summaries.
defaultPrompt: Screen a Saskatchewan AOI for uranium potential using GeoMine evidence lanes.
Evaluate an Ontario claim block for LCT pegmatite potential.
Review NI 43-101 terminology, evidence gaps, and disclosure caveats.
